Payment Method Findings
Field analysis per payment method — based only on observed data. Helps identify the minimum field set for each flow.
Legend: Core appears in all or almost all flows Common appears in many but not all flows Additional provider-specific or flow-specific only
🏦 PSE
Core
BankFull nameDocument numberEmail
Common
Phone numberDocument type
Additional
AddressCityAccount type
Recommended Minimum Field Set
BankFull nameEmailDocument typeDocument number
Bank selection is essential — PSE routes payments via the user's bank. Collect Bank + Full name + Email + Document type + Document number for a standard flow. Phone and Address only if the specific PSP requires them.
📱 Nequi
Core
Full namePhone number
Common
EmailDocument number
Additional
Document typeAccount name
Recommended Minimum Field Set
Full namePhone number
Phone number is the core Nequi identifier. Full name appears in all non-empty flows. Email and Document number are common but not universal. Start with Full name + Phone number.
💳 Bre-b
Core
Full name
Common
Phone numberEmail
Additional
Document typeDocument numberScreenshot
Recommended Minimum Field Set
Full namePhone number
Bre-b flows focus on a unique llave (key) generated by the provider. Full name is required; Phone number appears in most flows. P2P routes also require a screenshot proof.
🏛️ Bancolombia
Core
Full name
Common
Phone numberEmailDocument number
Additional
Document typeBank numberScreenshotTX id
Recommended Minimum Field Set
Full namePhone numberEmail
For Bancolombia via 4bill, Full name + Phone number + Email appears sufficient. If using supefina.net or smartfastpay.com, add Document type and Document number. Avoid P2P flows for automated processing.
📲 Daviplata
Core
Full name
Common
Phone number
Additional
EmailDocument typeDocument numberAddressScreenshot
Recommended Minimum Field Set
Full namePhone number
Daviplata is phone-linked — Phone number is the core identifier. Full name appears in all non-empty flows. Document fields and Address are provider-specific. Start with Full name + Phone number and extend based on the provider chosen.
📷 Tpaga (QR)
Core
Document typeDocument number
Additional
Full nameEmailPhone numberAddress
Recommended Minimum Field Set
Document typeDocument number
Based on limited data, Document type and Document number appear consistently for QR-based flows. Tpaga data coverage is thin — verify directly with the PSP before building.
🔄 Movii (PSE)
Core
Full nameEmailPhone number
Additional
Document typeDocument numberAddress
Recommended Minimum Field Set
Full nameEmailPhone number
Extremely limited data — only 2 providers observed. Treat PSE field requirements as a baseline. The 4bill API set (Full name + Phone + Email) appears as the practical minimum.
Summary
🏁 Final Conclusions
Key observations from the Colombia payment research.
Conclusion 1
Pay attention to PSP 1pago.net. Cashy uses it to process Nequi flows.
Conclusion 2
PSP topup.com.co processes PSE. Two providers resell this solution, and the same provider also offers Bre-b.
Conclusion 3
The main P2P solutions found on the market are Bancolombia, Daviplata, and Tpaga QR.
Conclusion 4
This report format is useful for understanding payment flows, providers, redirects, and required user fields in one place.
Conclusion 5
Preparing this type of report is informative, but it requires a lot of manual research and validation.
Colombia R&D · Payment Providers & Fields · May 2026
